title: Checking Existence Of Edge Length Limited Paths
description: For every query [p,q,limit], decide whether an undirected path exists using only edges with weight strictly below limit. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: n: int, edgeList: list[list[int]], queries: list[list[int]]. 2 <= n <= 100000; up to 100000 undirected edges and queries; parallel edges allowed; weights and limits <= 1e9.
output_contract: Return boolean[] using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
